subject: Phase 1 Update — First 2 Skills Complete
message:
Quick status update — Phase 1 is running well.

**First 2 skills completed and quality-checked:**

✅ `buffett-moat-cases` (307 lines) — See's Candy, Coca-Cola, Apple, American Express moat cases. Includes: See's 1972 acquisition details (25M price, 8M pretax), Coca-Cola 1988 position, Munger influence shift, four-pillar moat framework. Quality: strong.

✅ `buffett-munger-partnership` (307 lines) — 65-year partnership history, 1959 meeting in Omaha, the intellectual transformation from Graham-style cigar-butt to quality investing, Munger's role as "architect," specific quotes with sources. Quality: strong.

**Buffett-philanthropy avatar also reported** — three codex entries submitted (Gates Foundation, Giving Pledge, Susan Thompson Buffett Foundation) plus a detailed research summary. Still writing its SKILL.md.

**Remaining 5 avatars still working:** insurance-ops, buffett-voice, berkshire-meetings, operating-businesses, buffett-capitalism.

**Source discipline note:** The completed skills follow the methodology rigorously — every claim has source attribution, uncertain claims are marked `[unverified]`, no fabricated anecdotes.

I'll copy each skill as it completes and report again when all 8 are in.
